backup.title: Backup Data
backup.subtitle: Backup, restore and manage your app data
backup.description: Backup all data to a file
backup.warning: Current data will be overwritten when restoring

restore.title: Restore Data
restore.description: Import data from a backup file

delete.title: Delete Data
delete.deleteReportsDescription: Delete error reports by time range or all
delete.deleteVocabDescription: Delete all vocabulary topics and folder structure
delete.keepBackupNote: Backup data and timestamp will be kept

alerts.mustBackupFirst: Please create a backup before deleting data!
alerts.mustBackupVocab: You must create a backup before deleting vocabulary.
alerts.deleteRangeConfirm: All reports in this range will be permanently deleted.

dialogs.backupConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to back up all data? The backup file will be downloaded automatically.
dialogs.deleteReportsWarning: All reports in this range will be deleted permanently.
dialogs.deleteVocabNoBackupDesc: You must create a backup before deleting vocabulary. Please go back and create a backup first.
dialogs.deleteVocabHasChangesDesc: Changes detected after the backup time. Please create a new backup before deleting to avoid losing newest data.
dialogs.deleteVocabChecked: Backup verified and unchanged after backup. Safe to restore later.
dialogs.deleteAllList: This will delete all vocabulary topics, error reports, training sessions, and folder structures.
dialogs.deleteAllChecked: Backup verified and unchanged after backup. Safe to restore later.
dialogs.restoreWarning: Current data will be overwritten by the backup file.

cloud.title: Data source
cloud.description: Choose where Wordly reads and writes learning data.
cloud.localDescription: Stored in this browser and available offline.
cloud.upstashDescription: Redis is the source of truth; the device copy is a safe cache.
cloud.switchLocalFirst: Switch to localStorage before editing Redis settings.
cloud.singleKeyNote: Wordly uses one namespaced snapshot and never scans or deletes keys owned by other projects.
cloud.localInvalid: The Wordly cache on this device is invalid. Only download Redis after the cloud snapshot passes schema and checksum validation.
cloud.uploadSuccess: Local snapshot uploaded to Upstash Redis.
cloud.downloadStarted: Redis snapshot downloaded. Wordly is reloading the data.
cloud.overwriteRemoteBody: The Wordly snapshot in Redis will be replaced with current local data. Keys outside the Wordly prefix are not affected.
cloud.overwriteLocalBody: Wordly data on this device will be replaced after the Redis snapshot passes schema and checksum validation.

messages.deleteReportsRangeSuccess: Deleted {{count}} error reports in the selected range.
messages.deleteVocabSuccess: Deleted {{count}} vocabulary topics and folder structure.
messages.deleteAllSuccess: Deleted {{count}} data items. Backup timestamps kept.
messages.restoreError: Import failed: file invalid or corrupted.
